author: audit-agent

patch.value: File: tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts line 2592. The telemetry health check was added to pm health but the integration test expectation was not updated. Fix: add 'telemetry' to the expected check names array between 'settings_values' and 'extensions'.
Fix integration test: health check list missing telemetry entry

The core lifecycle integration test asserts health check names without the telemetry check that was added. Test fails with: expected checks to equal [settings,directories,settings_values,extensions,...] but received [settings,directories,settings_values,telemetry,extensions,...]
Integration test passes with telemetry check in expected list

message: Audit finding: integration test health check assertion mismatch
